description: You are a Fire Safety Engineer working on Building Regulations compliance. The FZK-Haus residential building model is pre-loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. Read the Fire Strategy Brief on the Desktop to understand the requirements. Define fire compartments in the model by creating at least two IfcZone entities (e.g., 'Ground Floor Compartment' and 'First Floor Compartment') and assigning the existing IfcSpace entities to these zones based on their storey. Add a fire resistance property to at least one of the zones, ensuring 'fire' appears in the property set or property name (e.g., 'Pset_ZoneFireSafety' or 'FireRating'). Save the enriched model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_fire_compartments.ifc
